title: Paris Review Article on VR/AR & VTubers
content:
Paris Review Article on VR/AR & VTubers

Local dark web networks
Non censored streaming content
Incel

Stolen celebrity essences (Tupac, Jim Carey novel)

Mention TPR articles on horror, FPSs (Christchurch shooting), The Last of Us’ romantic relationship

I spend every waking hour of every passing minute of every dredging day looking for ways to escape reality. There’s a list of things I’ve tried to escape reality, is much longer than the list of things I haven’t tried. As a child, it was simpler. First, Stories, second, then films and television. And games. Then as a teen, drugs.

Alcoholic’s Anonymous tied to internet anonymity
